summary: Kidnap & Ransom (K&R) insurance covering ransom payments, crisis management consultancy costs, and associated expenses for kidnap, extortion, wrongful detention, and hijacking incidents. Confidential policy -- existence not disclosed to insured employees.

schemaEntities.description: K&R risk entity. Custom: InsuredIndustry, TravelRegions, HighRiskCountryList, EmployeeCount_Travelling, SecurityProtocols, CrisisResponseRetainer, PreviousIncidentFlag, ExecutiveExposureScore, MediaProfile, ConfidentialityAgreementFlag, CrisisConsultantRetained, PoliceReportingPolicy.

76 rules: high-risk country list (FCO Travel Advice Level 3+), crisis consultant panel validation, confidentiality requirement enforcement, ransom limit adequacy vs executive exposure, media profile loading triggers.
Crisis consultant panel entity. Custom: ConsultantFirm, PanelApprovalDate, ResponseTimeGuarantee, SpecialistCapability, GeographicCoverage.

relationships.note: Ransom limit driven by executive exposure and high-risk country travel -- 12 risk custom fields
Crisis consultant panel assignment -- no GW Cloud equivalent for panel management
FCO high-risk country validation requires live FCDO Travel Advice API integration

migrationIssues.detail: K&R policies must remain confidential -- policy documents cannot be emailed to general inbox. GW Cloud document distribution requires custom confidentiality workflow.
CrisisConsultant_KR manages insurer crisis consultant panel (Control Risks, Pinkerton etc.). No GW Cloud equivalent -- new panel management entity required.
Dynamic FCDO Travel Advice Level 3+ country list required for acceptance/pricing. Live FCDO API integration required -- no GW Cloud native integration.
Executive media profile and exposure scoring logic. Custom Gosu algorithm -- GW Cloud rating rules can accommodate with configuration.

cloudMapping.action: FCDO Travel Advice Level 3+ dynamic country list integration required
Crisis consultant panel entity requires new GW Cloud design
Confidentiality flag supported -- document distribution workflow requires custom implementation
